About Aditya Nagpure

I'm a passionate Computer Technology student with a deep love for full-stack development, AI, and building products that create real-world impact.

My journey started with curiosity about how websites work, and it quickly turned into a full-blown passion for crafting digital experiences using React, Python, Flask, and AI tools.

When I'm not coding, I'm learning new tech, contributing to open-source, and dreaming of building the next big AI startup.

// about

About Me

I'm Aditya Nagpure, a Computer Technology student from Nagpur, India, deeply passionate about full-stack development, AI, and building products that solve real problems.

My journey began with curiosity about how websites work — and that curiosity turned into a passion for crafting digital experiences from scratch. I love taking an idea from concept to deployed product.

Currently focusing on mastering React, Python/Flask, and exploring AI-powered applications. My goal is to build a startup that leverages AI to make everyday life better.

📍 Nagpur, Maharashtra, India
🎓 Computer Technology Student
💼 Open to internships & collaborations
🚀 Building AI products & startups
